name: Oasis Touch Massage
tagline: Therapeutic massage and bodywork in downtown Santa Rosa
seoDescription: Oasis Touch Massage in Santa Rosa, CA — Swedish, deep tissue, hot stone, and CBD massage plus body sculpting, with owner and licensed massage therapist Michelle Martinez. CAMTC #86001.

images.heroAlt: Therapeutic massage at Oasis Touch Massage in Santa Rosa, CA

sections.heading: Your oasis for therapeutic massage and bodywork
sections.subheading: Licensed massage therapist Michelle Martinez offers Swedish, deep tissue, hot stone, and CBD massage — plus non-invasive body sculpting — to promote relaxation, stress relief, and a pain-free lifestyle.
badges: By appointment in downtown Santa Rosa

image.alt: Therapeutic massage at Oasis Touch Massage in Santa Rosa, CA

sections.heading: Michelle Martinez, your massage therapist
body: Welcome to my oasis. I'm Michelle, the owner and massage therapist behind Oasis Touch. I graduated with honors from the National Holistic Institute, a college of massage therapy, in 2021 and became a California state-certified therapist.

My mission is to promote relaxation, stress relief, and a pain-free lifestyle through therapeutic massage and bodywork. I love making a direct impact on each client's health and wellness — helping people recover from injury, ease stress, and find more ease within their body.
highlights: Graduated with honors, National Holistic Institute (2021)
Trained in Swedish, deep tissue, hot stone & CBD massage

image.alt: Michelle Martinez, owner of Oasis Touch Massage in Santa Rosa, CA

sections.heading: Massage therapy
sections.intro: Every session is tailored to what your body needs that day. A complimentary face massage can be added to any service.

items.title: Swedish Massage
items.description: Relaxing, therapeutic strokes and oils that improve circulation and relieve everyday stress and pain. 70 min $155 · 90 min $175.

items.title: Deep Tissue Massage
items.description: Focused pressure that releases tension in the deeper layers of muscle — ideal for chronic tightness and old injuries. 70 min $155 · 90 min $175.

items.title: Hot Stone Massage
items.description: Heated stones melt into tight muscles for a nurturing, rejuvenating, deeply relaxing session. 70 min $160 · 90 min $180.

items.title: CBD Massage
items.description: A THC-free massage using organic CBD extract with hempseed and jojoba oils to ease pain and inflammation. 70 min $160 · 90 min $180.

items.title: 30-Minute Targeted Massage
items.description: Concentrated bodywork on one problem area — neck, shoulders, or lower back — when you're short on time. 30 min $95.

items.title: Add-Ons
items.description: Enhance any session: red light therapy ($30), cupping therapy ($45), reflexology ($45), CBD cream ($10), or a sugar scrub ($45).

items.title: Licensed & credentialed
items.body: California state-certified (CAMTC #86001) and an AMTA member therapist, trained at the National Holistic Institute.

items.title: Tailored to your body
items.body: Swedish, deep tissue, hot stone, or CBD — each session is built around how you feel that day, not a script.

items.title: Downtown & by appointment
items.body: A private studio at 509 7th St in downtown Santa Rosa. Reserve ahead, especially on weekends.

items.quote: Michelle's massage technique is amazing — I've had her do four already.
items.author: Verified client

sections.heading: Ready for your oasis?
sections.body: Sessions are by appointment at 509 7th St Suite 100 in downtown Santa Rosa. Call (707) 582-5825 to book.

sections.heading: Massage and body sculpting
sections.subheading: Therapeutic massage tailored to your body, plus non-invasive body sculpting and contouring treatments.

sections.heading: Massage therapy

sections.heading: Body sculpting & contouring
sections.intro: Non-invasive, pain-free treatments to tone, tighten, and define — individually or in combo packages.

items.title: Ultrasonic Cavitation
items.description: Sound waves break down fat cells for a more toned, sculpted body — non-invasive and pain-free. 30 min $70.

items.title: Radio Frequency Skin Tightening
items.description: Stimulates collagen to firm loose skin, with no needles and no downtime. 40 min $80.

items.title: Laser Lipo
items.description: Laser light energy heats and liquifies excess fat cells, which the body clears naturally. 30 min $35.

items.title: Vacuum Therapy
items.description: Boosts circulation and lymphatic drainage while smoothing cellulite and fat deposits. 30 min $70.

items.title: Wood Therapy
items.description: Wooden instruments mold and redefine your contour and reduce cellulite through targeted massage. 30 min $95.

items.title: Buttocks Vacuum Therapy
items.description: A non-surgical lift that improves roundness and firmness. 30 min $85.

items.title: Combo Packages
items.description: That Jawline Tho! (45 min $70), Snatched Arms (30 min $85), Shred Life! (90 min $95), Cellulite Eliminator! (90 min $120), Waist Snatched! (90 min $120), Total Fat Reduction! (90 min $135).

sections.heading: Book your session
sections.body: Call (707) 582-5825 to reserve. Appointments fill quickly on weekends.

sections.heading: Meet Michelle Martinez
sections.subheading: Owner and licensed massage therapist, helping Santa Rosa find ease within their body since 2021.

sections.heading: A practice built on care
body: Welcome to my oasis. I'm Michelle, the owner and massage therapist behind Oasis Touch. I graduated with honors from the National Holistic Institute, a college of massage therapy, in 2021 and became a California state-certified therapist.

Massage therapy has been a rewarding journey for me. My mission is to promote relaxation, stress relief, and a pain-free lifestyle through therapeutic massage and bodywork — and to make a direct impact on the health and wellness of each client I see. There's nothing better than helping someone recover from an injury, let go of stress, and find more ease within their body.
highlights: Graduated with honors, National Holistic Institute (2021)
Trained in Swedish, deep tissue, hot stone & CBD massage
